title: dryopolystichum phaeostigma
intro: Dryopolystichum phaeostigma, a type of fern native to New Caledonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Dryopolystichum phaeostigma are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
